section.heading: Delegation of authority by Comptroller

content.p: The Comptroller of the Currency may delegate to any duly authorized employee, representative, or agent any power vested in the office by law.

section.sourceCredit: (R.S. § 327A, as added Pub. L. 96–221, title VII, § 707(a), Mar. 31, 1980, 94 Stat. 188.)
